oiii_hbeta_vs_gamma_t.physical_reason: Gas-phase metallicity reflects recent enrichment, not integrated history
oiii_hbeta_vs_gamma_t.falsification: Strong positive correlation (ρ > 0.3) would contradict TEP

stellar_met_vs_gamma_t.physical_reason: Stellar metallicity integrates over effective time, enhanced by Gamma_t

gas_stellar_offset.physical_reason: High-Gamma_t systems have older stellar populations but similar gas
gas_stellar_offset.falsification: Positive offset in high-Gamma_t systems would contradict TEP

nii_ha_vs_gamma_t.physical_reason: Nitrogen abundance is gas-phase, not integrated

stellar_metallicity.interpretation: Strong correlation as predicted by TEP

gas_metallicity.interpretation: Weak correlation as predicted by TEP

key_discriminant.stellar_vs_gas: Stellar metallicity should correlate more strongly with Gamma_t than gas metallicity
key_discriminant.falsification: [OIII]/Hβ showing ρ > 0.3 with Gamma_t would falsify TEP
